claim: FragAnnotor fixed component-score mode has completed CASMI2022 report-only rankings
guardrail: Describe as fixed formal component-score mode using real CASMI peaks and SIRIUS formula evidence, not as trained neural spectrum prediction.

claim: Native SIRIUS formula-only CASMI ranking completed
guardrail: SIRIUS is scalar molecular formula plausibility evidence here, not a synthetic spectrum generator.

claim: Complete native CFM-ID CASMI candidate-ranking metrics are available
support: Direct full-run manifest prepared for 170 supported queries and 1062950 candidate rows. Precomputed full-run manifest prepared for 936483 unique candidate spectra; completion status is incomplete_full_supported with 10 cached candidate spectra and 0 completed queries. Do not report native CFM-ID CASMI Top-k metrics until a complete per-query candidate score table is generated. Smoke/partial outputs are readiness evidence only, not benchmark results.
guardrail: Only report CFM-ID smoke/runtime audit until a full candidate score table exists.

claim: MS2DeepScore CASMI candidate-ranking benchmark is complete
support: MS2DeepScore environment/model cache verified=verified; full candidate ranking remains blocked because CASMI structure candidates lack a complete candidate spectrum library. Do not report MS2DeepScore CASMI Top-k metrics yet. MS2DeepScore scores spectrum pairs; the pretrained model and CPU environment are now externally available/verified, but the CASMI structure-candidate benchmark still lacks a complete per-candidate measured or predicted spectrum library and a query-candidate scoring wrapper. CFM-ID predicted spectra must be labeled as a CFM-ID plus MS2DeepScore hybrid baseline rather than native MS2DeepScore.
guardrail: Do not substitute CFM-ID-generated spectra and call it native MS2DeepScore.
